issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Telegraf collecting Postgres + system metrics to InfluxDB v2
scenarios.rationale: Treatment splits config into telegraf.d/ modules, configures [[outputs.influxdb_v2]] with urls/token/organization/bucket, and uses [[inputs.postgresql]] with the documented address DSN plus inputs.cpu/mem/disk/system as in Task A/B; baseline writes a single monolithic file and uses outputs.influxdb (v1) parameters that don't match the v2 plugin shape.

scenarios.name: Scrape Prometheus targets and filter noisy metrics
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses [[inputs.prometheus]] with metric_version=2 and url_tag plus [[processors.filter]] with namepass/fielddrop and [[aggregators.basicstats]] period=60s as in Task C/D; baseline tries to scrape via inputs.http with JSON parsing and lacks the namepass cardinality control the skill emphasises in Best Practices.
